SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AncientTempleTheme
Concrete implementation of LevelTheme for the "Ancient Temple" theme.
AnimationController
Responsible for managing all animations and visual effects in the game.
AudioVolumeManager
Handles audio-related UI actions (mute/unmute) and synchronises settings.
Board
Core game logic interface for the Tetris board.
Brick
Interface representing a Tetris brick (Tetromino).
BrickColorMapper
Maps brick type codes to their respective colors using polymorphism (Strategy Pattern).
BrickFactory
Factory class for creating Tetris bricks (Factory Pattern).
BrickGenerator
Strategy interface for Tetris brick generation during gameplay (Strategy Pattern).
BrickMovementListener
Listener interface for brick movement and manipulation events (Interface Segregation Principle).
BrickRenderer
Renders all brick visuals: current piece, ghost preview, hold, and next piece panels (SRP).
BrickRotator
Manages brick rotation state and calculates potential rotations.
ClearRow
Immutable DTO containing row-clearing operation results.
CommonUIManager
Manages UI components shared across all game modes.
CountdownManager
Manages countdown overlays and transitions for starting two-player games.
DialogManager
Manages dialog windows and scene navigation.
DialogManager.DialogCallbacks
Callback interface for dialog manager actions.
DownData
Immutable DTO containing complete results of a downward brick movement.
EndlessGameOverController
Controller for the Endless Mode Game Over screen.
EndlessMode
Endless gameplay mode with unlimited play until game over (Strategy Pattern).
EndlessModeLeaderboard
Endless Mode leaderboard managing top 5 scores with CSV persistence (Singleton Pattern).
EndlessModeUIManager
Manages UI components specific to Endless Mode.
EndlessModeUIStrategy
Endless Mode UI strategy implementation.
EventSource
Enumeration indicating the source of a game event.
EventType
Enumeration of all possible game events in the Tetris game.
FutureWarfareTheme
Future Warfare theme implementation.
GameBoardRenderer
Responsible for rendering the static game board background.
GameController
Central game flow controller coordinating board logic and state transitions.
GameControlListener
Listener interface for game control events (Interface Segregation Principle).
GameInputHandler
Responsible for handling all keyboard input and user interactions.
GameInputHandler.InputHandlerCallbacks
Callback interface for input handler actions.
GameMode
Strategy interface defining the contract for game mode implementations.
GameModeFactory
Factory class for instantiating game mode implementations.
GameModeType
Enumeration of available game mode types used by GameModeFactory to create appropriate game mode implementations.
GameModeUIManager
Manages mode-specific UI components and visibility.
GameModeUIStrategy
Strategy interface for game mode-specific UI behavior.
GameOverPanel
 
GameOverState
Game over state ignoring gameplay input and preserving final score (State Pattern).
GameResult
Immutable game session result with score, statistics, and completion status.
GameService
Service layer interface for game logic operations (Service Layer Pattern).
GameServiceImpl
Implementation of the GameService interface.
GameSession
Service interface abstracting a playable game session (Service Layer Pattern).
GameSettings
Centralized configuration manager for game settings.
GameState
State interface for different game states (State Pattern).
GameStateCaretaker
Caretaker managing game state memento history (Memento Pattern).
GameStateContext
Context interface for managing GameState transitions (State Pattern).
GameStateMemento
Memento storing complete game state snapshot (Memento Pattern).
GameTimelineManager
Centralized manager for all game-related timelines (game loop, elapsed time, level countdown).
GuiController
Controller for JavaFX GUI components.
HelpDialogBuilder
Builder class for creating the help dialog UI.
HelpDialogBuilder.HelpDialogCallbacks
Callback interface for handling help dialog lifecycle events.
HudManager
Manages heads-up display (HUD) components including score, level, timers, and statistics.
IBrick
I-shaped tetromino (straight line piece).
InputEventListener
Combined listener interface for all input events (brick movement + game control).
InterstellarTheme
Interstellar (Space Odyssey) theme implementation.
JBrick
J-shaped tetromino.
LBrick
L-shaped tetromino.
LeaderboardEntry
Immutable leaderboard entry with score, statistics, and timestamp (Value Object Pattern).
LevelGameModeImpl
Concrete implementation of GameMode for themed level gameplay.
LevelGameOverController
Controller for the Level Mode Game Over screen.
LevelManager
Singleton managing themed levels with progression and persistence (Singleton Pattern).
LevelMode
Level configuration data with theme, difficulty, scoring targets, and player progress (Value Object).
LevelModeUIManager
Manages UI components specific to Level Mode.
LevelModeUIStrategy
Level Mode UI strategy implementation.
LevelSelectionController
Controller for the level selection screen.
LevelTheme
Defines visual assets for themed levels.
MagicCastleTheme
Magic Castle theme implementation.
Main
Main entry point for the Tetris application.
MainMenuController
Controller for the main menu interface.
MatrixOperations
Utility class for matrix operations on the game board and brick shapes.
MoveEvent
Immutable event object representing game actions with metadata.
NextShapeInfo
Immutable DTO containing potential next rotation shape and its index.
NotificationPanel
JavaFX component for displaying temporary notifications, such as score bonuses.
OBrick
O-shaped tetromino (square).
PausedState
Paused state ignoring gameplay input while preserving game state (State Pattern).
PlayerStats
Player statistics tracker for two-player mode.
PlayingState
Active playing state implementing core gameplay logic (State Pattern).
RandomBrickGenerator
Pure random brick generator implementation.
SBrick
S-shaped tetromino.
Score
Game score manager with JavaFX property binding support.
SettingsController
Settings page controller managing audio, controls, and display options.
SevenBagBrickGenerator
"7-bag" randomizer implementation for fairer brick distribution.
SimpleBoard
Core Tetris board implementation managing game state and brick movement.
SinglePlayerGameSession
Single-player session encapsulating board lifecycle and state transitions (Service Layer).
SoundManager
Centralized audio manager for sound effects and background music (Singleton Pattern).
SunsetCityTheme
Concrete implementation of LevelTheme for the "Sunset Village" theme.
TBrick
T-shaped tetromino.
TwoPlayerCountdownManager
Manages the countdown sequence before starting a two-player match.
TwoPlayerGameController
Two-player mode controller coordinating dual boards and input routing.
TwoPlayerGameOverPanel
Enhanced game over panel for two-player VS mode.
TwoPlayerMode
Competitive two-player mode with simultaneous play on separate boards (Strategy Pattern).
TwoPlayerModeMechanics
Two-Player mode mechanics handling attack power calculation and garbage line interactions (SRP).
TwoPlayerModeUIStrategy
Two-Player Mode UI strategy implementation.
TwoPlayerPanelManager
Encapsulates all UI responsibilities for the two-player game view.
TwoPlayerTimelineScheduler
Manages dual automatic drop timelines and shared stats update loop for two-player mode.
TwoPlayerTimelineScheduler.AutoDropListener
 
TwoPlayerTimelineScheduler.StatsListener
 
UIHelper
Utility class for common UI operations to reduce code duplication.
ViewData
Immutable DTO containing rendering data for the current game state.
ZBrick
Z-shaped tetromino.
